projectInfo.credits: This product uses the NVD API but is not endorsed or certified by the NVD. This report contains data retrieved from the National Vulnerability Database: https://nvd.nist.gov, Github Advisory Database (via NPM Audit API): https://github.com/advisories/, and the RetireJS community.

dependency.description: Higher-level content negotiation
An AMQP 0-9-1 (e.g., RabbitMQ) library and client.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: An AMQP 0-9-1 (e.g., RabbitMQ) library and client.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Matches strings against configurable strings, globs, regular expressions, and/or functions

Node.js body parsing middleware
Brace expansion as known from sh/bash

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Brace expansion as known from sh/bash

dependency.description: Bash-like brace expansion, implemented in JavaScript. Safer than other brace expansion libs, with complete support for the Bash 4.3 braces specification, without sacrificing speed.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Bash-like brace expansion, implemented in JavaScript. Safer than other brace expansion libs, with complete support for the Bash 4.3 braces specification, without sacrificing speed.

dependency.description: Add support for more integer widths to Buffer

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Add support for more integer widths to Buffer

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Utility to parse a string bytes to bytes and vice-versa

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Helper functions around Function call/apply/bind, for use in `call-bind`

dependency.description: Robust call-bound JavaScript intrinsics, using `call-bind` and `get-intrinsic`.

evidence.name: description

dependency.description: Deprecate all the things
destroy a stream if possible

dependency.description: `Object.defineProperty`, but not IE 8's broken one.

dependency.description: Returns true if a string has an extglob.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Returns true if a string has an extglob.

dependency.description: Returns `true` if the given string looks like a glob pattern or an extglob pattern. This makes it easy to create code that only uses external modules like node-glob when necessary, resulting in much faster code execution and initialization time, and a better user experience.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Returns `true` if the given string looks like a glob pattern or an extglob pattern. This makes it easy to create code that only uses external modules like node-glob when necessary, resulting in much faster code execution and initialization time, and a better user experience.

dependency.description: Returns true if a number or string value is a finite number. Useful for regex matches, parsing, user input, etc.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Returns true if a number or string value is a finite number. Useful for regex matches, parsing, user input, etc.

dependency.description: ES Math-related intrinsics and helpers, robustly cached.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: ES Math-related intrinsics and helpers, robustly cached.

evidence.value: Simple RFC 6838 media type parser and formatter

dependency.description: Normalize slashes in a file path to be posix/unix-like forward slashes. Also condenses repeat slashes to a single slash and removes and trailing slashes, unless disabled.

evidence.value: Normalize slashes in a file path to be posix/unix-like forward slashes. Also condenses repeat slashes to a single slash and removes and trailing slashes, unless disabled.

dependency.description: Module for reading .pgpass

Blazing fast and accurate glob matcher written in JavaScript, with no dependencies and full support for standard and extended Bash glob features, including braces, extglobs, POSIX brackets, and regular expressions.

evidence.name: description
evidence.value: Blazing fast and accurate glob matcher written in JavaScript, with no dependencies and full support for standard and extended Bash glob features, including braces, extglobs, POSIX brackets, and regular expressions.
